title: tragacantha pavillonii
intro: Tragacantha pavillonii, also known as a type of Caltrop or Devil's thorn, is a plant species that belongs to the family Zygophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha pavillonii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
